title: ASHLAND/TALENT ST VINCENT DE PAUL OLM CONFERENCE - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL ASHLAND AND TALENT ASHLAND/TALENT ST VINCENT DE PAUL OLM CONFERENCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial help with living costs such as rent and utilities (including electricity, gas, heating fuel, and water). Depending on individual needs, assistance may also cover items like medical supplies, storage fees, camping supplies, or furniture. All assistance depends on current funding and is not guaranteed. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours; calls are returned during regular business hours Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 708-5650 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message phone (541) 708-5650 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a message with name, phone number, and a brief description of need FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Ashland and Talent SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday noon-4pm Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
